case_title: LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC VS. ALEXA A ARGUETA FLORES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2018 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 02/01/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, ALEXA A ARGUETA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00 SERVED OCT-20-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, ALEXA A ARGUETA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-22-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-01-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINITFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERGIO HERNANDEZ, COLLECTIONS. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-01-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-01-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINITFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SERGIO HERNANDEZ, COLLECTIONS EMPLOYEE. DEFENDANT ALEXA A ARUETA FLORES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LENDIFY FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, ALEXA A ARGUETA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,610.00, FOR NON-PAYMENT OF INSTALLMENTS ON A PERSONAL LOAN AGREEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
